content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_AR_Aging
-- drop view v_AR_Aging
as

SELECT      Division
,           Company
,           BusinessUnit
,           Customer_ID
,           Customer_Name
,           Invoice
,           Round(Balance, 2) as Balance
,           InvoiceDate
,           DueDate
,           AccountingDate
,           cast(Terms as varchar(8)) as Terms

FROM
(
SELECT      CINO, SUM(CUAM) AS BALANCE
FROM        M3.FSLEDG
WHERE       TRCD IN (10, 20)
GROUP BY    CINO
) A 

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT      CASE WHEN SU.CFC3 = 'COM' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN SU.CFC3 = 'CNR' then 'Consumer'
            WHEN SU.CFC3 = 'GWT' then 'International'
            else 'TBD'
            end as Division
,           'M3' AS Company
,           CASE WHEN SU.CUNO like 'COM%' then 'Commercial'
            WHEN SU.CUNO like '7%' then 'Consumer'
            WHEN SU.CUNO like '5%' then 'Compact'
            WHEN SU.CUNO like 'GWT%' then 'International'
            else 'TBD'
            end as BusinessUnit
,           FP.CUNO AS Customer_ID
,           SU.CUNM AS Customer_Name
,           FP.CINO as Invoice
,           FP.IVDT as InvoiceDate
,           FP.DUDT as DueDate
,           FP.ACDT as AccountingDate
,           cast(FP.TEPY as varchar(8)) as Terms
FROM        M3.FSLEDG FP
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA SU ON FP.CUNO = SU.CUNO
WHERE       FP.TRCD = 10
) B         on A.CINO = B.Invoice
and          Round(Balance,2) <> 0

/*
SELECT          'Consumer' as Division
,               AR.[system-id] as Company
,               'Compact' as BusinessUnit
,               AR.[cust-key] as Customer_ID
,               C.[cust-name] as Customer_Name
,               cast(AR.[ref-num] as varchar(40)) as Invoice
,               AR.[open-amt] as Balance
,               AR.[ref-date] as Invoice_Date
,               AR.[due-date] as Due_Date
,               cast(datediff(day, [due-date], [ref-date])*-1 as varchar(8)) as Terms
FROM            APR.[ar-open] as AR  
Left join       APR.[custname] as C on C.[cust-key] = AR.[cust-key]  
where           [open-amt] <> '0'
AND             AR.[system-id] = 'Avanti'

UNION ALL

SELECT          'Consumer' as Division
,               'Edgecraft' AS Company
,               'Countertop' as BusinessUnit
,               AR.CUSTOMER_ID as Customer_ID
,               AC.NAME as Customer_Name
,               cast(AR.INVOICE_ID as varchar(40)) as Invoice
,               CASE WHEN AR.[SYS_CURR_TOTAL_AMT] < 0 THEN round( -(AR.TOTAL_NET_AMOUNT + Ar.TOTAL_FRGHT_AMOUNT + Ar.TOTAL_FIN_CHARGE + TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT - TOTAL_PAID_AMOUNT - WRITEOFF_APPLIED),2) 
                     WHEN AR.[SYS_CURR_TOTAL_AMT] > 0 THEN round((AR.TOTAL_NET_AMOUNT + Ar.TOTAL_FRGHT_AMOUNT + Ar.TOTAL_FIN_CHARGE + TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT - TOTAL_PAID_AMOUNT - WRITEOFF_APPLIED),2)
                     END AS Balance
,               AR.INVOICE_DATE as Invoice_Date
,               CASE WHEN T.NET_DAYS IS NULL THEN DATEADD(DAY, 0, AR.INVOICE_DATE) 
                    ELSE DATEADD(DAY, T.NET_DAYS, AR.INVOICE_DATE) END AS Due_Date
,               cast(T.NET_DAYS as varchar(8)) as Terms
FROM            ECM.RECEIVABLES_RECEIVABLE AS AR 
LEFT JOIN       ECM.RECEIVABLES_CUSTOMER AS AC ON AC.ID = AR.CUSTOMER_ID 
LEFT JOIN       ECM.SHARED_TERMS_RULE AS T ON T.ID = AR.TERMS_RULE_ID
WHERE           (AR.INVOICE_STATUS = 'OPEN') AND (YEAR(AR.INVOICE_DATE) >= '2020')
AND             CASE WHEN AR.[SYS_CURR_TOTAL_AMT] < 0 THEN round( -(AR.TOTAL_NET_AMOUNT + Ar.TOTAL_FRGHT_AMOUNT + Ar.TOTAL_FIN_CHARGE + TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT - TOTAL_PAID_AMOUNT - WRITEOFF_APPLIED),2) 
                     WHEN AR.[SYS_CURR_TOTAL_AMT] > 0 THEN round((AR.TOTAL_NET_AMOUNT + Ar.TOTAL_FRGHT_AMOUNT + Ar.TOTAL_FIN_CHARGE + TOTAL_TAX_AMOUNT - TOTAL_PAID_AMOUNT - WRITEOFF_APPLIED),2)
                     END <> 0

UNION ALL

SELECT          'Commercial' as Division
,               'AFS' AS 'Company'
,               'Commercial' as BusinessUnit
,               AR.[Customer] as Customer_ID
,               AC.Name as Customer_Name
,               AR.[Invoice] as Invoice
,               AR.[InvoiceBal1] as Balance
,               convert(varchar(11), AR.[InvoiceDate], 110) as InvoiceDate
,               convert(varchar(11), dateadd(day, DueDays, InvoiceDate), 110) as DueDate
,               cast(T.DueDays as varchar(8)) AS Terms
FROM            SCA.[ArInvoice] AS AR 
LEFT JOIN       SCA.[ArCustomer] AS AC ON AC.Customer = AR.Customer 
LEFT JOIN       SCA.TblArTerms AS T ON T .TermsCode = AR.TermsCode
WHERE           AR.InvoiceBal1 <> '0'

UNION ALL

SELECT          'Consumer' as Division
,               'Omega' AS 'Company'
,               'Countertop' as BusinessUnit
,               AR.[Customer] as Customer_ID
,               AC.Name as Customer_Name
,               AR.[Invoice] as Invoice
,               AR.[InvoiceBal1] as Balance
,               convert(varchar(11), AR.[InvoiceDate], 110) as InvoiceDate
,               convert(varchar(11), dateadd(day, DueDays, InvoiceDate), 110) as DueDate
,               cast(T.DueDays as varchar(8)) AS Terms
FROM            SCO.[ArInvoice] AS AR 
LEFT JOIN       SCO.[ArCustomer] AS AC ON AC.Customer = AR.Customer 
LEFT JOIN       SCO.TblArTerms AS T ON T .TermsCode = AR.TermsCode
WHERE           AR.InvoiceBal1 <> '0'


UNION ALL

SELECT          'Commercial' as Division
,               'KDI' AS 'Company'
,               'Commercial' AS BusinessUnit
,               AR.[Customer] as Customer_ID
,               AC.Name as Customer_Name
,               AR.[Invoice] as Invoice
,               AR.[InvoiceBal1] as Balance
,               convert(varchar(11), AR.[InvoiceDate], 110) as InvoiceDate
,               convert(varchar(11), dateadd(day, DueDays, InvoiceDate), 110) as DueDate
,               cast(T.DueDays as varchar(8)) AS Terms
FROM            SCK.[ArInvoice] AS AR 
LEFT JOIN       SCK.[ArCustomer] AS AC ON AC.Customer = AR.Customer 
LEFT JOIN       SCK.TblArTerms AS T ON T .TermsCode = AR.TermsCode
WHERE           AR.InvoiceBal1 <> '0'

UNION ALL

SELECT          'International' as Division
,               'GWT' AS 'Company'
,               'International' as BusinessUnit
,               AR.[Customer] as Customer_ID
,               AC.Name as Customer_Name
,               cast(AR.[Invoice] as varchar(40)) as Invoice
,               AR.[InvoiceBal1] as Balance
,               convert(varchar(11), AR.[InvoiceDate], 110) as InvoiceDate
,               convert(varchar(11), dateadd(day, DueDays, InvoiceDate), 110) as DueDate
,               cast(T.DueDays as varchar(8)) AS Terms
FROM            SCG.[ArInvoice] AS AR 
LEFT JOIN       SCG.[ArCustomer] AS AC ON AC.Customer = AR.Customer 
LEFT JOIN       SCG.TblArTerms AS T ON T .TermsCode = AR.TermsCode
WHERE           AR.InvoiceBal1 <> '0'

UNION ALL

SELECT          CASE WHEN AR.Branch in ('BC', 'BG', 'BL', 'BN', 'VA', 'VC', 'VE', 'VG', 'VN') then 'Commercial'
                ELSE 'Consumer' END as Division
,               CASE WHEN AR.Branch IN ('BC', 'BG', 'BL', 'BN') THEN 'Blakeslee' 
                WHEN AR.[Branch] IN ('EC', 'EE', 'EF', 'EG', 'EO', 'ER', 'EW') THEN 'Excalibur' 
                WHEN AR.[Branch] IN ('VA', 'VC', 'VE', 'VG', 'VN') THEN 'Bevles' 
                WHEN AR.[Branch] IN ('XR') THEN 'Kitchen Discount' 
                WHEN AR.[Branch] IN ('ZC', 'ZD', 'ZG', 'ZN', 'ZR', 'ZX') 
                THEN 'Zeroll' ELSE 'Legacy' END AS 'Company'
,               CASE WHEN AR.Branch in ('BC', 'BG', 'BL', 'BN', 'VA', 'VC', 'VE', 'VG', 'VN') then 'Commercial'
                ELSE 'Countertop' END as BusinessUnit
,               AR.[Customer] as Customer_ID
,               AC.Name as Customer_Name
,               AR.[Invoice] as Invoice
,               AR.[InvoiceBal1] as Balance
,               convert(varchar(11), AR.[InvoiceDate], 110) as InvoiceDate
,               convert(varchar(11), dateadd(day, DueDays, InvoiceDate), 110) as DueDate
,               cast(T.DueDays as varchar(8)) AS Terms
FROM            SCL.[ArInvoice] AS AR 
LEFT JOIN       SCL.[ArCustomer] AS AC ON AC.Customer = AR.Customer 
LEFT JOIN       SCL.TblArTerms AS T ON T .TermsCode = AR.TermsCode
WHERE           AR.InvoiceBal1 <> '0'

UNION ALL

SELECT          'Commercial' as Division
,               'Admiral' as Company
,               'Commercial' as BusinessUnit
,               AR.[customer] as Customer_ID
,               C.name as Customer_Name
,               cast(AR.ar_id as varchar(40)) as Invoice
,               AR.[opn_balance] as Balance  
,               AR.[item_date] as InvoiceDate   
,               AR.[due_date] as DueDate
,               cast(datediff(day, [due_date], [item_date])*-1 as varchar(8)) as Terms
FROM            [ADC].[ar_main] as AR  
left join       [ADC].[customer] as C on C.customer = AR.customer  
where           opn_balance <> '0'
and             AR.company_ar = 'AD'
and             C.company_cu = 'AD'
*/
